canParse(TypeKey, String) - Method in interface io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.common.spi.ValueCoercer
Cheapest, side-effect-free check: can the raw token be read as the given logical type? Must never throw.
canParse(TypeKey, String) - Method in class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.fabric.FabricValueCoercer
 
canParse(Object, String) - Method in class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.common.Effect
Side-effect-free predicate: would token parse to a value compatible with def's runtime type? Delegates to the bound ValueCoercer via EffectFactory.getCoercer().

onGlideToggle(EntityToggleGlideEvent) - Method in class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.BukkitListeners.GlideSafetyListener

placeAllOnShutdown() - Method in class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.BukkitListeners.GlideSafetyListener
Place every still-gliding player on the highest safe block in the column below them, or synthesize an emergency 3×3 platform on top of the first non-air block when no safe block exists.
placeOnShutdown - Variable in class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.BukkitListeners.GlideSafetyListener.GlideState
 
PLACEONSHUTDOWN - Enum constant in enum class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.LocalEffects.enums.GlideTypeNames
If true, on shutdown still-gliding players are placed at the highest safe block below them.

resolveReflective(Class<?>, String) - Method in interface io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.common.spi.ValueCoercer
Reflective fallback used by Effect#fixData when classify(Object) returns TypeKey.UNKNOWN — the default value's runtime class is not one of the known logical types and the coercer should try valueOf(String) / getByName(String) / a registry lookup keyed by targetType.

run() - Method in class io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.LocalEffects.NoteEffect
